page.title: AI × eBPF
page.description: eBPF-based tracing, observability, and safety work for AI agents and LLM systems.
page.bodyHtml:
AgentSight is a observability tool designed specifically for monitoring LLM agent behavior through SSL/TLS traffic interception and process monitoring. Unlike traditional application-level instrumentation, AgentSight observes at the system boundary using eBPF technology, providing tamper-resistant insights into AI agent interactions with minimal performance overhead.

✨ Zero Instrumentation Required - No code changes, no new dependencies, no SDKs. Works with any AI framework or application out of the box.

  • Github: https://github.com/eunomia-bpf/agentsight/
  • Arxiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.02736

Quick Start

Visit http://127.0.0.1:8080 to view the recorded data.

Real-time process tree visualization showing AI agent interactions and file operations

Real-time timeline visualization showing AI agent interactions and system calls

Visit http://127.0.0.1:8080 to view the captured data in real-time.

🚀 Why AgentSight?

Traditional Observability vs. System-Level Monitoring

ChallengeApplication-Level ToolsAgentSight Solution
Framework Adoption❌ New SDK/proxy for each framework✅ Drop-in daemon, no code changes
Closed-Source Tools❌ Limited visibility into operations✅ Complete visibility into prompts & behaviors
Dynamic Agent Behavior❌ Logs can be silenced or manipulated✅ Kernel-level hooks, tamper-resistant
Encrypted Traffic❌ Only sees wrapper outputs✅ Captures real unencrypted requests/responses
System Interactions❌ Misses subprocess executions✅ Tracks all process behaviors & file operations
Multi-Agent Systems❌ Isolated per-process tracing✅ Global correlation and analysis

AgentSight captures critical interactions that application-level tools miss:

  • Subprocess executions that bypass instrumentation
  • Raw encrypted payloads before agent processing
  • File operations and system resource access
  • Cross-agent communications and coordination

🏗️ Architecture

Core Components

  1. eBPF Data Collection (Kernel Space)

    • SSL Monitor: Intercepts SSL/TLS read/write operations via uprobe hooks
    • Process Monitor: Tracks process lifecycle and file operations via tracepoints
    • <3% Performance Overhead: Operates below application layer with minimal impact

  2. Rust Streaming Framework (User Space)

    • Runners: Execute eBPF programs and stream JSON events (SSL, Process, Agent, Combined)
    • Analyzers: Pluggable processors for HTTP parsing, chunk merging, filtering, logging
    • Event System: Standardized event format with rich metadata and JSON payloads

  3. Frontend Visualization (React/TypeScript)

    • Timeline View: Interactive event timeline with zoom and filtering
    • Process Tree: Hierarchical process visualization with lifecycle tracking
    • Log View: Raw event inspection with syntax highlighting
    • Real-time Updates: Live data streaming and analysis

Data Flow Pipeline

eBPF Programs → JSON Events → Runners → Analyzer Chain → Frontend/Storage/Output

Usage

Prerequisites

  • Linux kernel: 4.1+ with eBPF support (5.0+ recommended)
  • Root privileges: Required for eBPF program loading
  • Rust toolchain: 1.88.0+ (for building collector)
  • Node.js: 18+ (for frontend development)
  • Build tools: clang, llvm, libelf-dev

📄 License

MIT License - see LICENSE for details.

description.en: eBPF-based tracing, observability, and safety work for AI agents and LLM systems.
description.zh: 面向 AI agent 和 LLM systems 的 eBPF tracing、observability 与安全工作。

intro.en: Execution engines, toolchains, runtime components, and low-level extension paths.
intro.zh: 执行引擎、工具链、runtime 组件和底层扩展路径。

intro.en: Tutorials, documentation, blog posts, and research papers for eBPF builders.
intro.zh: 面向 eBPF 开发者的教程、文档、博客和研究论文。

intro.en: Tracing, observability, and safety work for AI agent systems.
intro.zh: 面向 AI agent 系统的 tracing、observability 和安全研究。

description.en: A high-performance userspace eBPF runtime and extension framework for uprobes, USDT, syscall, XDP, GPU, and related workflows.
description.zh: 面向 userspace 的高性能 eBPF runtime 和扩展框架，覆盖 uprobe、USDT、syscall、XDP、GPU 等工作流。

description.en: Executable eBPF tutorials from hello world to sched-ext, networking, userspace tracing, and GPU scenarios.
description.zh: 从 hello world 到 sched-ext、网络、userspace tracing 和 GPU 场景的可执行 eBPF 教程。

description.en: Curated entry points for runtime documentation, project references, and practical eBPF guides across the site.
description.zh: 汇总 runtime 文档、项目参考和站内实用 eBPF 指南的入口。

description.en: Technical posts on eBPF, userspace runtimes, AI tracing, systems research, and production engineering notes.
description.zh: 关于 eBPF、userspace runtime、AI tracing、系统研究和工程实践的技术文章。

description.en: Research artifacts and paper links covering bpftime, LLM-assisted tracing, AI agent safety, and GPU systems work.
description.zh: 覆盖 bpftime、LLM-assisted tracing、AI agent safety 和 GPU systems 的研究产物与论文入口。

description.en: Build, package, distribute, and run eBPF programs with JSON metadata and WebAssembly OCI workflows.
description.zh: 使用 JSON metadata 和 WebAssembly OCI workflow 构建、打包、分发并运行 eBPF 程序。

description.en: Generate eBPF tracing programs with natural language and use LLMs to explore Linux kernel behavior.
description.zh: 用自然语言生成 eBPF tracing 程序，并借助 LLM 探索 Linux 内核行为。

description.en: Zero-instrumentation LLM and AI agent observability with eBPF, process monitoring, and TLS traffic correlation.
description.zh: 基于 eBPF、进程监控和 TLS traffic correlation 的零插桩 LLM 与 AI agent 可观测性。

description.en: A userspace eBPF VM with LLVM JIT/AOT support, used as the compiler and execution core of bpftime.
description.zh: 支持 LLVM JIT/AOT 的 userspace eBPF VM，也是 bpftime 的编译和执行核心。

description.en: WebAssembly-based eBPF tooling and runtime support for lightweight sandboxing and cloud native deployment.
description.zh: 基于 WebAssembly 的 eBPF 工具链和运行时支持，适合轻量级沙箱和云原生部署场景。

description.en: Research on semantic rollback attacks in agent checkpoint/restore workflows and intent-aware fencing.
description.zh: 关于 agent checkpoint/restore 工作流中语义回滚攻击和 intent-aware fencing 的研究。
